entity.label: Joash
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One who had charge of the royal stores of oil under David and Solomon (1 Chr. 27:28).

nodes.label: Joash
nodes.description: One who had charge of the royal stores of oil under David and Solomon (1 Chr. 27:28).

verses.text: And over the olive trees and the sycomore trees that were in the low plains was Baalhanan the Gederite: and over the cellars of oil was Joash:
